recommendations.title: Happiest Season
recommendations.overview: A young woman's plans to propose to her girlfriend while at her family's annual holiday party are upended when she discovers her partner hasn't yet come out to her conservative parents.

recommendations.title: Identity
recommendations.overview: Complete strangers stranded at a remote desert motel during a raging storm soon find themselves the target of a deranged murderer. As their numbers thin out, the travelers begin to turn on each other, as each tries to figure out who the killer is.

recommendations.title: Anamorph
recommendations.overview: A detective must solve the case of a serial killer who enacts anamorphosis, a painting technique that manipulates the laws of perspective, only with human bodies.

recommendations.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
recommendations.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

recommendations.title: Jackie & Ryan
recommendations.overview: A modern day train hopper fighting to be a successful musician and a single mom battling to maintain custody of her daughter defy their circumstances by coming together in a relationship that may change each other's lives forever.

recommendations.title: The Rental
recommendations.overview: Two couples on an oceanside getaway grow suspicious that the host of their seemingly perfect rental house may be spying on them. Before long, what should have been a celebratory weekend trip turns into something far more sinister.

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: It's a Disaster
recommendations.overview: Four couples meet for Sunday brunch only to discover they are stuck in a house together as the world may be about to end.

recommendations.title: Per tutta la vita
recommendations.overview: Four married couples find out their marriage is invalid because it was officiated by a fraudulent priest and have to decide what to do next.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: The Comeback Kid
recommendations.overview: Armed with boyish charm and a sharp wit, the former "SNL" writer offers sly takes on marriage, his beef with babies and the time he met Bill Clinton.
